title: Digital Marketing Zero To Hero-2 days
subtitle: A hands-on digital skills workshop for applying digital marketing zero to hero-2 days in everyday work.
whyThisMatters: Digital Marketing Zero To Hero-2 days helps participants turn course concepts into practical workplace habits. The programme gives teams a shared foundation, clearer language, and guided practice so they can connect the subject to productivity, accuracy, and confidence with workplace technology and apply the learning with more confidence after the workshop.
builtFor: Office teams using digital tools in daily work
Managers who want stronger productivity and reporting habits
Employees who need practical confidence with workplace technology
walkAwayWith: Use the relevant tools or concepts with clearer purpose and structure.
Improve accuracy, productivity, and confidence in everyday tasks.
Apply practical workflows to workplace documents, data, or communication.
Build reusable habits that support better digital work.
methodologyCaption: Most of the session is hands-on: participants practise tasks, compare outputs, and refine workflows for their own roles.
sourceDoc: course/documents-markdown/Digital Marketing Zero To Hero-2 days.md
